samples.xml_description:
```xml
<module id="multi_8bit">
    <description>Multiplies two 8-bit operands A and B using the shift-and-add method.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="A" width_description="[7:0]">First 8-bit input operand (multiplicand).</input>
        <input id="B" width_description="[7:0]">Second 8-bit input operand (multiplier).</input>
        <output id="product" width_description="[15:0]">16-bit output representing the product of A and B.</output>
    </ports>
    <implementation>Performs multiplication of A and B using the shift-and-add method.</implementation>
</module>
```
